# nullcloud_loadbalancer (Data Source)

Fetches a NullCloud load balancer by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nullcloud_loadbalancer" "example" {
  id = "lb-abc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the load balancer.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `protocol` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `targets` (List of Object) List of targets this load balancer routes to. Each object has `type` (String) and `id` (String).
